query: SELECT j.id, j.title, j.status, j.employer_id, COUNT(a.id) as app_count FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN applications a ON a."jobId" = j.id GROUP BY j.id, j.title, j.status, j.employer_id ORDER BY j.created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
